reasoning: I'll produce a concise summary of the key facts: who is involved, the conditional plan to play, and the context about his wife and labour.
output: Stuart Bingham, the 2015 world snooker champion, said he would play in the 2016 World Championship only if his wife goes into labour before his first-round match against Joe Perry on Monday; he noted his wife has been supportive and has previously been in labour for up to 10 hours, and he would need to discuss the situation with her before deciding.
